methodology.preprocessing: 4th-order Butterworth LP filter at 2Hz to remove sub-breath noise
methodology.d_min_strategy: 55% of estimated half-breath period, clamped to [50, 160] samples
methodology.ground_truth: Trough between consecutive annotated inhale peaks (BIDMC breath annotations)

notes: DG-v5 wins on all condition types (+0.001 to +0.124 over best SOTA)
Largest win on irregular-rate breathing (bidmc04): DG=0.261 vs WD=0.138 (+0.124)
WaveletDenoise is strongest SOTA on respiratory; BinSeg trails significantly
All F1 values lower than synthetic benchmark due to noisy real signals and ambiguous ground truth
bidmc04 (irregular rate) is the hardest case — DG's structural parsing handles rate variation better
